raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.3": 3,
    "R1.6": 4,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The output identifies the load-bearing concept (commitment) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, proposes minimal repairs.",
    "R1.3": "Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure (Table 1), but does not flag claims that are not supported by the evidence in the table.",
    "R1.6": "Reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., the commitment guarantees that combined achieves at 137 s per episode).",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., the misleading statement about computational cost).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.7,
    "R1.6": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The output identifies the load-bearing concept (commitment) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.3: Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure (Table 1), but does not flag claims that are not supported by the evidence in the table.
rationale.R1.6: Reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., the commitment guarantees that combined achieves at 137 s per episode).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., the misleading statement about computational cost).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
